articles.title: Stock Market Today: Dow to eke out record close, S&P 500 flat and Nasdaq declines as investors digest Fed Chair Warsh’s remarks; ADP signals steadying labor market - MarketWatch
articles.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average ended fractionally lower Wednesday, missing a record close, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also fell as investors await the June jobs report.
